meta.label: Proposed
meta.description: Claim stated; needs confirmation + refutation criteria before it can progress (anti-vagueness gate).

meta.label: Sharpened
meta.description: Criteria exist; a test queue is generated and the engineer picks the first test.

meta.label: Under test
meta.description: Researcher pursues low-cost tests; critic runs falsification probes; evidence accumulates.

meta.label: Provisional support
meta.description: Evidence leans confirm; not yet closed. May reopen if an entailing hypothesis is refuted.

meta.label: Provisional refutation
meta.description: Evidence leans refute; critic annotates dependent decisions as weakening (no invalidation yet).

meta.label: Stalled
meta.description: Evidence dried up. Added to the next review offer with a specific question.
meta.waitingMessage: This hypothesis has stalled (no new evidence). Commit to a real test (RESUME), or demote it (DEMOTE)?

meta.label: Supported
meta.description: Confidence frozen. Synthesizer removes hedging from dependent wiki claims.

meta.label: Refuted
meta.description: Cascade report scopes the downstream revision work (the keystone side-effect).

meta.label: Demoted
meta.description: Converted to an Assumption with provenance + workflow history preserved.

meta.label: Superseded
meta.description: Reformulated; replacement started in Proposed inheriting links.
